name: xdm_settings_workflow_overlay
description: Adds bounded network and download defaults, authenticated proxy support, host credentials, versioned settings transfer, and legacy XDM settings/category/queue migration.
commitMessage: Add settings workflow and legacy migration
constraints: Do not restore or build WPF, GTK, WinForms or MSIX targets
Do not execute imported settings content
Redact proxy and server passwords from exports by default
Apply proxy and HTTP handler changes after restart
